subcodes.first_line: O maidservant of God! In the forefront of creation and the inception of existence is the verse: "Thou seest no flaw in the creation of the All-Merciful, nor..." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله در صدر ابداع و مبدء ایجاد ایه لن تری فی خلق الرحمن من فتور و لن
subcodes.subjects: @role and station of women, @knowledge; recognition of God
